Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Uncle Fury]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Uncle Fury is making a selection in ten days.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy mentions an Uncle Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Uncle Fury began fighting during the conflict.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Fury is Mercy and Pride's uncle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Uncle Fury is a member of the Akura clan.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon reminds Mercy of her Uncle Fury due to his size and gestures.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Uncle Fury is fundamentally incapable of listening to anything that sounds boring.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Uncle Fury liked Mercy's father.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy refers to Akura Fury as Uncle Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Uncle Fury wants Pride to pursue advancement at all costs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Uncle Fury has blazing red eyes and waving hair.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
